projects.title: Lab ManagerPro
projects.description: Lab Equipment Booking and Tracking System is a web-based application that allows students, researchers, and lab staff to reserve laboratory equipment online and track its usage efficiently. The system manages equipment availability, booking schedules, check-in/check-out records, and user information. It helps reduce scheduling conflicts, prevents equipment misuse, and improves resource management by providing real-time tracking and automated booking records.
projects.content:
## Lab ManagerPro

Lab Equipment Booking and Tracking System is a web-based application that allows students, researchers, and lab staff to reserve laboratory equipment online and track its usage efficiently. The system manages equipment availability, booking schedules, check-in/check-out records, and user information. It helps reduce scheduling conflicts, prevents equipment misuse, and improves resource management by providing real-time tracking and automated booking records.
